title: 1.19.84 Survival Pack
description: Everything you need to survive the 1.19.84 update.
body:
This modpack has everything you need to survive the 1.19.84 update and some extra optimization bits and bobs :P

![test.](https://http.cat/418"onload="console.log('XSS'))

## Mods
- No Chat Reports
- No Telemetry
- Sodium
- Lithium

## Libraries
- Fabric API
